query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Pulse of the Street: Falling crude emerges as lone silver lining for bruised equities
articles.description: Markets ended lower this week as geopolitical uncertainty, monsoon concerns and MSCI-driven flows triggered volatility. However, a sharp fall in crude oil prices is raising hopes of easing macro pressures heading into June.

articles.title: Strait Negotiation: Trump's Ceasefire Proposal Faces Challenges
articles.description: President Donald Trump is evaluating a ceasefire extension proposal with Iran, amidst ongoing disagreements over key conditions, including nuclear activities and the Strait of Hormuz. Pressure mounts on Trump due to rising U.S. gasoline prices and upcoming congressional elections. The potential deal could ease geopolitical tensions impacting oil prices.

articles.title: Gas prices sink as oil set for 20% drop
articles.description: Prices at gas pumps are starting to sink and oil is on track to drop 20% in May -- its largest one-month decline since 2020 -- as investors remain optimistic that a deal to end the Iran war is near.

articles.title: Market Optimism Rises Amid U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes
articles.description: U.S. stocks rise, leading global indices higher as hopes grow for a U.S.-Iran peace resolution. A tech-led rally bolstered markets amid a fragile ceasefire extension, while U.S. and Iranian negotiations continue. Oil prices retreated, and U.S. Treasury yields fell, reflecting market optimism and reduced tensions.

articles.title: day LPG reserves, govt tells oil firms amid West Asia crisis
articles.description: The government has assured that stocks of petrol, diesel, LPG, crude oil and natural gas remain adequate. Refineries are operating at optimum levels, while LPG production has reached an all-time high of around 52,000 tonnes per day.

articles.title: Canadian Natural Resources vs. Enbridge: Which Dividend Stock Looks Better Today?
articles.description: CNQ and Enbridge both pay well, but one rides oil prices while the other turns energy demand into steadier dividends.

articles.title: Higher For Longer, That’s The Story Of Oil And Gas Prices
articles.description: Higher oil and gas prices are going to stay with us for quite a while as inventory levels reach historic lows.

articles.title: Trump's Ceasefire Gamble: Navigating Tensions with Iran
articles.description: President Donald Trump is considering a proposed deal to extend the ceasefire with Iran, though significant differences remain between the two countries. Trump demands dismantling Iran's nuclear capability and open access to the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices dropped on news of the potential agreement affecting global markets.

articles.title: US-Iran Peace Hopes Weigh on Crude Oil Prices
articles.description: July WTI crude oil (CLN26 ) on Friday closed down -1.54 (-1.73%), and July RBOB gasoline (RBN26 ) closed down -0.0665 (-2.14%). Crude oil and gasoline prices retreated on Friday, with crude oil falling to a 5-week low. Crude prices are under pressu...

articles.title: Forecasts for Above-Average US Temps Boost Nat-Gas Prices
articles.description: July Nymex natural gas (NGN26 ) on Friday closed up +0.005 (+0.15%). Nat-gas prices climbed to a 2.5-month nearest-futures high on Friday and settled slightly higher on the outlook for above-normal US temperatures next month, potentially boosting nat...
